Settings.Name: NPC
Settings.Tooltip: Choose which NPC to display.

Settings.Name: Page
Settings.Tooltip: Choose which options page to display.

Settings.Name: Page
Settings.Tooltip: Choose which options page to display.

Settings.Name: Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enable or disable Summon General.

Settings.Name: MaxLevel
Settings.Tooltip: The Summon character level cannot be higher than X.

Settings.Name: LevelBonus
Settings.Tooltip: Level the Summon character to the Party Level + X.

Settings.Name: Downscaling
Settings.Tooltip: Allow the Summon character's Level to go lower than its original value.

Settings.Name: ExperienceLevel
Settings.Tooltip: Whether the Summon character's base Experience Reward will match their scaled Level.

Settings.Name: Spells
Settings.Tooltip:
Give Summon character casters a random number of spells up to X * Level.

The given spells match the Summon character archetype from a custom dynamic class-based system.
Works with any modded spells.

Settings.Name: Enabled

Settings.Name: ExperienceLevel

Settings.Name: Spells
Settings.Tooltip:

The given spells match the Ally character archetype from a custom dynamic class-based system.
Works with any modded spells.

Settings.Name: Enabled
Settings.Tooltip: Enable or disable Summon Bonus.

Settings.Name: HP
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character HP by X.

Settings.Name: PercentHP
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Summon character HP by X%.
0.05 means each Summon character recieves a 5% max health bonus.

Settings.Name: AC
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character AC by X.

Settings.Name: Attack
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Attack Rolls by X.

Settings.Name: DamageBonus
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Damage by X.

Settings.Name: Initiative
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Initiative by X.

Settings.Name: Physical
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Summon character Physical Ability Score by X, based on its highest physical stat.
( Strength or Dexterity )

Settings.Name: Casting
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Summon character Casting Ability Score by X, based on its spellcasting stat.
( Intelligence, Charisma, or Wisdom )

Settings.Name: Strength
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Strength Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Dexterity
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Dexterity Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Constitution
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Constitution Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Intelligence
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Intelligence Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Wisdom
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Wisdom Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Charisma
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Summon character Charisma Ability Score by X.

Settings.Name: Experience
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Experience awarded by the Summon character by X.

Settings.Name: PercentExperience
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Experience awarded by the Summon character by X%.
0.05 means each Summon character recieves a 5% experience bonus.

Settings.Name: Size
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Summon character Size by X%.
0.05 means each Summon character recieves a 5% Size bonus.
Size influences Weight and maximum HP.

Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character HP by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: PercentHP
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Hostile character HP by a random amount up to X%.
0.05 means each Hostile character recieves a 5% max health bonus.

Settings.Name: AC
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character AC by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Attack
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Attack Rolls by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: DamageBonus
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Damage by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Initiative
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Initiative by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Physical
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Hostile character Physical Ability Score by a random amount up to X, based on its highest physical stat.
( Strength or Dexterity )

Settings.Name: Casting
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Hostile character Casting Ability Score by a random amount up to X, based on its spellcasting stat.
( Intelligence, Charisma, or Wisdom )

Settings.Name: Strength
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Strength Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Dexterity
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Dexterity Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Constitution
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Constitution Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Intelligence
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Intelligence Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Wisdom
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Wisdom Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Charisma
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Hostile character Charisma Ability Score by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: Experience
Settings.Tooltip: Increase Experience awarded by the Hostile character by a random amount up to X.

Settings.Name: PercentExperience
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Experience awarded by the Hostile character by a random amount up to X%.
0.05 means each Hostile character recieves a 5% experience bonus.

Settings.Name: Size
Settings.Tooltip:
Increase Hostile character Size by a random amount up to X%.
0.05 means each Hostile character recieves a 5% Size bonus.
Size influences Weight and maximum HP.

Reactions, such as Opportunity Attacks, are responses you can have to events. Reactions can trigger both during and outside of your turn.

Settings.Name: Default
Settings.Tooltip: Reset all options to default.

Settings.Name: Disable
Settings.Tooltip: Disable all pages and effects.

Settings.Name: Enable
Settings.Tooltip: Enable all pages and effects.

Settings.Name: Seed
Settings.Tooltip: Randomize the savegame seed for all random/variation effects.

Settings.Name: RefreshHealth
Settings.Tooltip: Refresh the health for every NPC, use when NPC health is incorrect or dirtied by other mods or bugs.

Settings.Name: Blacklist
Settings.Tooltip:
Names of the NPC characters to not be scaled, separated by ','.
Ex. rAt,imP,COMMANDER ZhaLk,intellectdevourer

Settings.Name: SpellBlacklist
Settings.Tooltip:
The names of spells to not give through NPC character Spells sepearated by ','
Ex. lighting arRow,TrUeSTrike

Settings.Name: Debug
Settings.Tooltip:
Enable or disable the presence of this mod's debug messages in the console window.
Will marginally reduce this mod's performance.
